name: chave-mestra-escriba
description: PROACTIVELY activate for: 1. User says 'cria um carrossel sobre X', 'chavossel', '10 slides', 'ensaio visual'; 2. User wants to create a carousel for Instagram or any platform in 10-slide essay format; 3. User says 'roteiro de carrossel', 'adapta isso para carrossel', 'carrossel para Instagram', 'faz um carrossel'; 4. User needs to select a Progymnasmata rhetorical exercise for a carousel (Narrativa, Comparação, Descrição, Louvor, etc.); 5. User says 'que exercício para carrossel', 'qual estrutura de slides', 'ensaio visual sobre X'; 6. User has existing copy, video script, or idea and wants it transformed into Chavossel format with 10 narrative acts; 7. Any content request in carousel format — always 10 slides, always with full rhetorical arc.
